I am, well, we're in the, just the end of month one for our quarter.
So it's been a little bit of chaos in the last week or so, just trying to get, like, some strategic planning cycles scheduled and meetings in place, but it's all manageable.
So to be honest, I don't really have a lot of updates for you, because our solution engineers are still kind of swamped.

I'm not sure if you got any approvals since I sent them, like, the articles to prioritize.

Yeah, that's the only update I have for you.
Like, I think next week we're going to be able to come up with a solution because we're in person.
You also need input from me on the product matrix, right?

And so that would help us at least make sure there's less review needed for any of, like, product mentions or any of those.
So that would be, I think, a priority to get done.
That way, future content that we put out probably has less comments on it.
Let me just find the Notion page in.
Field to review product feature matrix.
I'm going to send this to Jenny.
Can you share this document with Jenny as well?
I will send a link to it when we hang up for Slack.
Send the GrowthX team and take this.
I think I can give you, like, a better plan next week, and I'm going to push Phil as much as possible.
Jenny is escalating this to our leadership, too, so I hope that will solve the problem.
Yeah, I mean, I get it.
Like, there's not much you can control if they're swamped and not replying.
So, yeah, once you have a conversation next week, maybe we have a plan to kind of start to remedy some of this.
Just because, yeah, the, you know, we'll keep continue to develop content, but I think the product feature matrix review, prioritizing that, getting done, will be super helpful.
And then hopefully be less of a lift for kind of reviews going forward if we get that right.
And then obviously we'll continue to kind of iterate as we get feedback on the pipeline and making sure we update artifacts.
So the more feedback we get, the better it gets.
So we have best software solutions for accounting firms in 2026.
I wanted to see if that one's a little too close to, like, that comparison content that we have kind of been avoiding.
It doesn't mention any, like, Fieldguide direct competitors, but it's just, like, I can show it to you.
I think if we don't, like, call out direct competitors, it should be fine.
I will review it with Mark.
Um, I just want to, like, focus on...
Yeah, I don't know if that's going to fly.
I can send it to Mark and ask for his feedback.
I'm going to try to push this along and then give you feedback once I have more.
And then we did have that product and solution page audit.
And so it is quite long just because they went pretty deep on.
Like your homepage is basically where all your keywords are at.
then product and solution pages, there's, you know, almost non-existent.
Wow, Erik, this is so perfect.
And so timely because like next week is our planning session.
So I'm going to show that to them.
And then we kind of ranked it by the priority pages you mentioned.
of, like, where to focus first.
So optimizations of, like, primary target keywords based on volume and, like, where the action items lie kind of with updating the page title, H1s, different content sections to consider.
Like, as you're looking at a full kind of redesign, these are, again, like...
Recommendations for an SEO lens, obviously, the UX and, like, experience of your audience is first and foremost.
So if anybody pushes back on these, like, it's not going to hurt our feelings.

So we just wanted to kind of anchor it in, you know, how do we kind of target certain keywords for the most volume so that we can maybe 2 to 3x traffic over the next six months with this kind of approach.
It goes page by page, so lots of things to consider.
I'm going to give this a thorough read and reach out if I have any questions, if that's okay.
And again, I apologize for this, like, that we're not posting any articles.

So I do think that like, this quarter coming up, we will be able to tidy up like kind of the flow.
And then we also hired a new person on solution engineering, so they have more resources.
So we will go back to publishing.
And then, I know you have an offsite next week.
Is our time still good for check-in?
I might just like send you a note to reschedule.
And I can always provide async updates.
Let's do that since we just chatted today.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content backlog, new audit, and upcoming planning.](https://fathom.video/share/49qnyV8XMgstM7NfgCyaHjVyzU2ZezjL?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Backlog:** A 29-article backlog is stalled by unresponsive Solution Engineers (SEs). Yasine will create a plan at the upcoming offsite to clear it.](https://fathom.video/share/49qnyV8XMgstM7NfgCyaHjVyzU2ZezjL?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
  - [**Product Matrix Priority:** The "Product Feature Matrix" is the top priority. A complete version will streamline future content reviews by providing a single source of truth for product capabilities.](https://fathom.video/share/49qnyV8XMgstM7NfgCyaHjVyzU2ZezjL?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
  - [**SEO Audit Delivered:** GrowthX delivered a detailed audit of Fieldguide's product/solution pages, identifying major keyword gaps and providing actionable recommendations for a potential 2-3x traffic increase.](https://fathom.video/share/49qnyV8XMgstM7NfgCyaHjVyzU2ZezjL?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
  - [**Meeting Rescheduled:** The next sync is rescheduled to an async update due to Fieldguide's offsite.](https://fathom.video/share/49qnyV8XMgstM7NfgCyaHjVyzU2ZezjL?tab=summary&timestamp=847.0)

## Topics

### Content Backlog & SE Bottleneck

  - [**Problem:** A 29-article content backlog is stalled by unresponsive Solution Engineers (SEs).](https://fathom.video/share/49qnyV8XMgstM7NfgCyaHjVyzU2ZezjL?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
  - [**Context:** SEs are swamped with pre-Series C pipeline goals, which has deprioritized content reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/49qnyV8XMgstM7NfgCyaHjVyzU2ZezjL?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
  - [**Mitigation:**](https://fathom.video/share/49qnyV8XMgstM7NfgCyaHjVyzU2ZezjL?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
      - [Jenny (Fieldguide) is escalating the issue to leadership.](https://fathom.video/share/49qnyV8XMgstM7NfgCyaHjVyzU2ZezjL?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
      - [A new SE hire is expected to increase team capacity.](https://fathom.video/share/49qnyV8XMgstM7NfgCyaHjVyzU2ZezjL?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
  - [**Progress:** 3 articles were published recently (1 from last week, 2 this week).](https://fathom.video/share/49qnyV8XMgstM7NfgCyaHjVyzU2ZezjL?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)

### Product Feature Matrix

  - [**Priority:** Completing the "Product Feature Matrix" is the top priority.](https://fathom.video/share/49qnyV8XMgstM7NfgCyaHjVyzU2ZezjL?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
  - [**Rationale:** A complete matrix will serve as a single source of truth for product capabilities, reducing the need for extensive reviews on future content.](https://fathom.video/share/49qnyV8XMgstM7NfgCyaHjVyzU2ZezjL?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
  - [**Action:** Yasine will send the matrix draft to Jenny for review.](https://fathom.video/share/49qnyV8XMgstM7NfgCyaHjVyzU2ZezjL?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)

### "Best Software" Article Review

  - [**Question:** Is the article "Best software solutions for accounting firms in 2026" too close to competitor comparison content?](https://fathom.video/share/49qnyV8XMgstM7NfgCyaHjVyzU2ZezjL?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
  - [**Clarification:** The article avoids naming direct competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/49qnyV8XMgstM7NfgCyaHjVyzU2ZezjL?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
  - [**Decision:** Yasine will review the draft with Mark (Fieldguide) for final approval.](https://fathom.video/share/49qnyV8XMgstM7NfgCyaHjVyzU2ZezjL?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)

### SEO Audit of Product & Solution Pages

  - [**Delivery:** GrowthX delivered a detailed SEO audit of Fieldguide's product and solution pages.](https://fathom.video/share/49qnyV8XMgstM7NfgCyaHjVyzU2ZezjL?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
  - [**Key Finding:** Fieldguide's homepage carries nearly all keyword weight, while product/solution pages are under-optimized.](https://fathom.video/share/49qnyV8XMgstM7NfgCyaHjVyzU2ZezjL?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
  - [**Content:** The audit provides page-by-page recommendations for titles, H1s, and content sections.](https://fathom.video/share/49qnyV8XMgstM7NfgCyaHjVyzU2ZezjL?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)
  - [**Goal:** A 2-3x traffic increase over the next six months.](https://fathom.video/share/49qnyV8XMgstM7NfgCyaHjVyzU2ZezjL?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)
  - [**Timing:** The audit is timely for Fieldguide's upcoming planning session.](https://fathom.video/share/49qnyV8XMgstM7NfgCyaHjVyzU2ZezjL?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Yasine:**](https://fathom.video/share/49qnyV8XMgstM7NfgCyaHjVyzU2ZezjL?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
      - [Create a plan at the offsite to clear the content backlog.](https://fathom.video/share/49qnyV8XMgstM7NfgCyaHjVyzU2ZezjL?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
      - [Send the "Product Feature Matrix" draft to Jenny.](https://fathom.video/share/49qnyV8XMgstM7NfgCyaHjVyzU2ZezjL?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
      - [Review the "Best Software" article with Mark.](https://fathom.video/share/49qnyV8XMgstM7NfgCyaHjVyzU2ZezjL?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
      - [Share the SEO audit with the team for planning.](https://fathom.video/share/49qnyV8XMgstM7NfgCyaHjVyzU2ZezjL?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
  - [**Erik:**](https://fathom.video/share/49qnyV8XMgstM7NfgCyaHjVyzU2ZezjL?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
      - [Share the "Product Feature Matrix" link with Jenny.](https://fathom.video/share/49qnyV8XMgstM7NfgCyaHjVyzU2ZezjL?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/49qnyV8XMgstM7NfgCyaHjVyzU2ZezjL?tab=summary&timestamp=847.0)
      - [Reschedule the next sync to an async update.](https://fathom.video/share/49qnyV8XMgstM7NfgCyaHjVyzU2ZezjL?tab=summary&timestamp=847.0)

action_items.description: Draft backlog reduction plan w/ SEs at offsite; share w/ Erik
Send product feature matrix link to Jenny via Slack
Send 'Best software solutions for accounting firms in 2026' draft to Mark; update Erik
Review GrowthX SEO audit; share w/ planning team; send questions to Erik
Send async updates to Yasine next week
